text_raw: Seeker of order...
text_clean: Seeker of order...

text_raw: Through the tether of mind I speak to you.
text_clean: Through the tether of mind I speak to you.

text_raw: Come forth to my altar, before my voice is lost to silence.
text_clean: Come forth to my altar, before my voice is lost to silence.

text_raw: Long have I awaited this fated moment, shrouded in the illusion of chance.
text_clean: Long have I awaited this fated moment, shrouded in the illusion of chance.

text_raw: My name is Aeserion.
text_clean: My name is Aeserion.

text_raw: I restored balance to the world, turning folly into wisdom,
text_clean: I restored balance to the world, turning folly into wisdom,

text_raw: so men proclaimed me the God of Knowledge.
text_clean: so men proclaimed me the God of Knowledge.

text_raw: Now I am but a prisoner, bound in a cage of flesh.
text_clean: Now I am but a prisoner, bound in a cage of flesh.

text_raw: Once, I sealed away the Ancients, beings drunk on the Abyss and lust for ruin.
text_clean: Once, I sealed away the Ancients, beings drunk on the Abyss and lust for ruin.

text_raw: But they struck back, driving three shackles deep into my body.
text_clean: But they struck back, driving three shackles deep into my body.

text_raw: Now my spirit, imprisoned in this form, remains chained to this temple,
text_clean: Now my spirit, imprisoned in this form, remains chained to this temple,

text_raw: while the Ancients, wielding artifacts, claw once more toward this world.
text_clean: while the Ancients, wielding artifacts, claw once more toward this world.

text_raw: Seeker of order, I shall inscribe the marks of the Ancients into your mind.
text_clean: Seeker of order, I shall inscribe the marks of the Ancients into your mind.

text_raw: So that the world shall not be scarred again by their ruin...
text_clean: So that the world shall not be scarred again by their ruin...

text_raw: Let wisdom flourish where chaos would reign.
text_clean: Let wisdom flourish where chaos would reign.

text_raw: Power is the birthright of the strong.
text_clean: Power is the birthright of the strong.

text_raw: Ugh...!
text_clean: Ugh...!

text_raw: I need greater power...!
text_clean: I need greater power...!

text_raw: Aaaah...!
text_clean: Aaaah...!

text_raw: Mortals are truly pathetic creatures.
text_clean: Mortals are truly pathetic creatures.

text_raw: Amuse me, mortal.
text_clean: Amuse me, mortal.

text_raw: I've spent a lifetime in pursuit of power.
text_clean: I've spent a lifetime in pursuit of power.

text_raw: My power is now without equal!
text_clean: My power is now without equal!

text_raw: This power is justice itself.
text_clean: This power is justice itself.

text_raw: Kneel before my might.
text_clean: Kneel before my might.

text_raw: Do you fear me?
text_clean: Do you fear me?

text_raw: I marvel at your courage, rivaled only by your wisdom.
text_clean: I marvel at your courage, rivaled only by your wisdom.

text_raw: I sense the Ancients no longer walk this land.
text_clean: I sense the Ancients no longer walk this land.

text_raw: My spirit at last knows peace.
text_clean: My spirit at last knows peace.

text_raw: But tell me, why have you returned?
text_clean: But tell me, why have you returned?

text_raw: Is it pity you hold for my plight?
text_clean: Is it pity you hold for my plight?

text_raw: With the Ancients gone, their shackles weaken.
text_clean: With the Ancients gone, their shackles weaken.

text_raw: Should your mercy reach as far as this ancient serpent...
text_clean: Should your mercy reach as far as this ancient serpent...

text_raw: will you break the bonds carved deep into my flesh?
text_clean: will you break the bonds carved deep into my flesh?

text_raw: Focus your spirit. Call upon the power of nature.
text_clean: Focus your spirit. Call upon the power of nature.

text_raw: Your kindness...
text_clean: Your kindness...

text_raw: has altered the flow of the universe.
text_clean: has altered the flow of the universe.

text_raw: The shadow of the Ancients lingers no more,
text_clean: The shadow of the Ancients lingers no more,

text_raw: and my manacles have been torn away.
text_clean: and my manacles have been torn away.

text_raw: You have restored balance to the Abyss,
text_clean: You have restored balance to the Abyss,

text_raw: and granted me freedom.
text_clean: and granted me freedom.

text_raw: Many may never know your name,
text_clean: Many may never know your name,

text_raw: but earth and sea will remember your steps.
text_clean: but earth and sea will remember your steps.

text_raw: Wisdom shall bloom once more,
text_clean: Wisdom shall bloom once more,

text_raw: and I shall forever remember you as the one who sowed its seed.
text_clean: and I shall forever remember you as the one who sowed its seed.
